title: Hody’s Ambition Breaks
description: On pages 11–13, this part follows Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8. The central beat is hody’s ambition breaks.
scene: The scene focuses on hody’s ambition breaks, with Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #8 shaping the conflict.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Where do you think you're going?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I know it must be difficult...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: No matter who... is responsible for this...

dialogue.speaker: Fish-Man Island Citizens
dialogue.text: Straw hat... I beg of you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: We have no need for the past!!!

summary: Hody’s Ambition Breaks. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
